content_body:
Because all of our homes are privately owned, Cabin Rentals of Georgia has specific cabin rental policies in place to protect the property of our valued homeowners. Below is short summation of pertinent information and rental policies. We are happy to host your stay with us in beautiful Blue Ridge, and hope that your time spent with us will be memorable! For more information, visit our FAQ here.

  • At the time of booking 1/2 of the total is due. The balance will be due 14 days prior to arrival.
  • There will be a $100 charge to change cabins and a $75 charge to change dates. Any changes of this nature are granted on a case by case basis by CRG.

  • Cancellation Notice on All Reservations

    60+ days before rental date days - 50% refund of total minus the processing fee
    59-30 days - 25 % refund of total minus the processing fee
    29 days or less - No Refund 

  • Check-In is between 3:30 pm and 5:30 pm. If you check in after 5:30, be sure to follow our turn-by-turn directions as the office closes at 5:30 pm. Check-Out is promptly at 10:00 am. There is a $50.00 charge up to 2 hours for an early check in/late check out. This request must be approved by CRG. 

  • Additional Guests ~

    The rates stated on each cabin page are for 4 guests only. To add additional guests will be $25/person/night + appropriate taxes and cleaning fees associated. This allows smaller groups to enjoy the luxury amenities a larger home provides without paying an extravagant flat fee. We ask for an honest Guest count at the time of booking and beyond throughout our communication. If unauthorized guests are discovered at the cabin you have reserved, this constitutes a policy violation as stated in your Rental Agreement.

  • Pets ~
    Just because a cabin is deemed Pet Friendly does not mean that pets are free. (No cats.) ALL dogs must be approved by the management prior to adding them to the reservation. We only allow certain breeds due to the nature of our luxury cabins. If unauthorized dogs are discovered during your stay, all pet fees will be doubled.
     
  • Pet Friendly Cabins only accept dogs under 35 lbs., non-shedding, and crate trained. No dog is to be left unattended in the cabin while the Guest is away because they will cause damage. The pet fee is $50/pet/night, there is a $75 pet cleaning fee, and a refundable $250 pet deposit that is refunded upon departure as long as there are no pet damages, excessive pet hair, etc. 

GENERAL POLICIES:

  • Last-minute bookings may be available, but the full amount will be due at the time of booking.
  • At least one person 25 years of age or older must stay overnight in the cabin each day of the rental period. (Married couples under 25 may request a waiver.)
  • No dirt bikes, all-terrain vehicles, firearms, or firecrackers are permitted on the property.
  • No illegal drugs or other illegal activities are permitted on the property.
  • NO SMOKING is allowed in the cabin or on the porches.

  • Privacy Policy for Guest Management by Cabin Rentals of Georgia

    Cabin Rentals of Georgia respects your preferences concerning the collection and use of your Personal Information. The following states the different ways your Personal Information is collected and used in our app and servers:

    1. STORAGE: Access and download PDF reports generated by the app.
    2. PHONE STATE: Allows the user to launch phone UI with prefilled telephone number for the user to make the call whether he or she decides to do so.
    3. ACCOUNTS - Improves user experience by automatically filling text inputs with your information

    Changes To This Privacy Policy 

    This Privacy Policy is effective as of 2025 and will remain in effect except with respect to any changes in its provisions in the future, which will be in effect immediately after being posted on this page. We reserve the right to update or change our Privacy Policy at any time and you should check this Privacy Policy periodically. Your continued use of the app after we post any modifications to the Privacy Policy on this page will constitute your acknowledgment of the modifications and your consent to abide and be bound by the modified Privacy Policy. If we make any material changes to this Privacy Policy, we will notify you either through the email address you have provided us or by placing a prominent notice on our website.

  • SMS Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy
    By opting into our text messaging services, you consent to receive promotional and reservation-related messages from Cabin Rentals of Georgia. Message frequency may vary, and standard message and data rates may apply. To opt-out, reply "STOP" at any time to cease receiving promotional messages. For help, reply "HELP" or contact us at info@cabin-rentals-of-georgia.com or call (706) 432-2140. Your privacy is important to us. We do not share, sell, or distribute your text messaging opt-in data or consent to third parties.
title: Rental Policies
